sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array_split (id UInt32, values Array(UInt32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, arraySplit((x, y) -> (y > 0), values) AS split_values FROM test_array_split WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_array_split SET values = arraySplit((x, y) -> (y < 3), values) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, arraySplit((x, y) -> (y = 3), values) AS split_at_three FROM test_array_split;
